topics.title: Claude Code Plan Mode Deep Dive: Why Ultraplan Changes Production Workflows
topics.whyTrending: Ultraplan entered early preview April 2026 - draft plans in cloud, review in web editor, run remotely. Plan Mode adoption is becoming the #1 productivity multiplier for senior engineers. Every tutorial stops at Shift+Tab; nobody explains the architecture or cost tradeoff vs local plan mode

topics.title: Claude Code Headless Mode: The Complete CI/CD Automation Playbook
topics.whyTrending: Headless mode with -p flag unlocks CI pipelines, pre-commit hooks, GitHub Actions. Scheduled Tasks launched Q1 2026 let Claude run cloud jobs. Most tutorials cover basic claude -p but miss --bare, --output-format stream-json, and production patterns like error recovery and token budgeting in CI

topics.title: Claude Code Token Optimization: How I Cut My Bill by 70% in One Week
topics.whyTrending: Token costs are the #1 complaint in 2026 Claude Code discussions. Users report $20-40/day without optimization vs $5-15/day with good habits. opusplan, prompt caching, /compact vs /clear, CLAUDE.md bloat, .claudeignore - concrete strategies exist but scattered across 20+ blog posts

topics.title: Parallel Claude Code Sessions with Git Worktrees: A Production Setup
topics.whyTrending: Anthropic's internal team reports running 10-15 parallel Claude sessions as their #1 productivity tip. Teams using git worktrees report 18% throughput improvement. The claude -w flag makes worktrees first-class but production patterns (merge strategies, review queues, context hygiene) remain undocumented

topics.title: Claude Code vs Cursor vs Codex in 2026: The Honest Developer Comparison
topics.whyTrending: Three fundamentally different architectures - terminal agent, AI-native IDE, async cloud VM. Benchmark shows Claude Code uses 5.5x fewer tokens than Cursor. Hybrid workflows dominate among senior devs. Every comparison is marketing fluff; nobody shows real task benchmarks with token counts

topics.title: Writing CLAUDE.md That Actually Works: The 100-Line Workflow Pattern
topics.whyTrending: CLAUDE.md is read at every session start - every word costs tokens forever. 70% compliance rate means rules like 'don't push to main' are production incidents waiting to happen. The gap: when to use CLAUDE.md vs hooks vs skills vs slash commands, with concrete examples

topics.title: Claude Code MCP Tool Search: How Lazy Loading Solves the 400-Server Problem
topics.whyTrending: MCP ecosystem exploded to 400+ community servers. Without Tool Search, loading them all blows your context. Claude Code's lazy-loading MCP cuts context by 95%. The architecture behind this isn't explained anywhere - developers still think they have to pick and choose servers

topics.title: Scheduled Claude Code Agents: Running AI Jobs While You Sleep
topics.whyTrending: Q1 2026's Scheduled Tasks feature pushes Claude Code beyond a laptop tool - recurring cloud jobs for PR reviews, CI failure analysis, dependency audits. Remote Control lets you interact via API. Nobody has written the 'operational AI' playbook for this architecture shift yet

topics.title: Claude Code Auto Mode vs --dangerously-skip-permissions: The Middle Ground Explained
topics.whyTrending: Anthropic data: users approve 93% of prompts anyway. Auto Mode launched Q1 2026 as middle ground - approves reversible actions, blocks destructive. The tradeoff between safety and flow state is the hottest debate in the community. Security implications poorly understood

topics.title: Computer Use in Claude Code: When Terminal Isn't Enough
topics.whyTrending: March 2026: Claude Code got Computer Use - can open files, click, navigate GUIs. For frontend devs testing UI, designers reviewing output, or anyone bridging CLI and GUI worlds, this changes what Claude Code can automate. Still zero serious tutorials, mostly screenshots and marketing
